name: mojo-tuple-return-types
description: Documents correct Mojo v0.26.1 syntax for multi-value returns: use Tuple[T,...] in return type, (v,...) in return statement, and [N] for element access. Use when: (1) writing a Mojo fn that returns multiple values, (2) encountering 'no matching function in initialization' errors on tuple return types, (3) refactoring duplicated logic into a shared helper that returns multiple computed values.
